title: Phase 0 — Multi-tenancy gate
notes: Verify multi-tenancy is installed and working correctly

title: Phase A — Generate feature models
notes: Run blueprint generation, migrations, and register models

title: Phase B — Implement Extras
notes: Implement custom policies, validations, and callbacks (Extras)

title: Phase C — Verify
notes: Verify multi-tenancy, API endpoints, and AC status

title: Phase D — Write tests
notes: Write unit and integration tests for all models and policies
